reviews.review_description: Really the only full encompassing “gta vr”. I feel like it has everything it needs in place but the base interactions just need to be polished. Like grabbing npcs could be a lot smoother, gun handling could be better. Gun falls through holster and the world constantly. Hand often gets stuck getting in cars. Missions completely resetting every fail is very tedious as most of the mission is just getting from point A to point B. Would really appreciate a deadzone setting. It is really asset pack heavy but it’s also one of the only games really doing this.  A start but could be more, I hope the dev can continue to put it all together solidly.

reviews.review_title: Closest thing to GTA in VR
reviews.review_description: This is the closest thing to GTA in VR I have experience. I have tried a few GTA type games and they have not been the greatest but Viper Vice from the way you can take someone out of the car to the way you can rob someone to the way you can even rob a bank. But the best thing that I have seen and never in another VR game is drifting. This game has come a long way from me being the very first tester to the release date and it has so much more it has to offer

This game is absolutely amazing and is only going to get better. All the missions and side missions are so fun and I love that I can play basketball. If your looking for a gta vr game look know father, what are you waiting for,  it's time for some Mayhem👍😎👋

How do I get the weapon attachments if the update that the developer put into the game says weapon attachments when I try to go to the gun store their is no optimization for them. I would just really like to know how to do that. But for the story mission I have completed the cobra gang and the magusta family. So the question is do I have to complete the serpent eagles missions to unlock or is their a different way of doing this.please let me know.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Weapon attachment update isn’t out yet. Stay tuned. Check out the roadmap to see what I’m working on atm.

reviews.review_description: The game is really good but I’ve gotten a little far in the mangusta family jobs and in the one where you take over the cobras turf there’s a glitch where when you get done with the call the phone will ring again and cancel the quest that started after the don first hung up then when you answer that he’ll ask if you’ve done it yet then hang up and it will keep ringing over and over again and I don’t think I’ll be able to progress any further

developer_response.body: Hi, It sounds like you reached the Turf Wars 1 Mission. in this mission you need to takeover all Cobra Gangs turfs before you can answer the phone again. Look at your map to see all the turfs. Go to one of the turfs and then shoot few cobra gang members until the turf war begins :)

reviews.review_description:
Where is the vice PD for missions I found it once and can’t find it again! Thank you!!! This game is really cool. Thanks for the experience!!!
( just a note- I noticed a few times when I wrecked it threw me above the city and I landed in another area) still a really cool game thanks again!!!

developer_response.body: Once you exit the safehouse, drive towards the left or look at the map. The first pizza place on the left, go to that. On the other side of the road, you'll see the police station and police cars. I should probably add the police station to the map :)

reviews.review_description: This is the GTA of VR and if your not into it yet just leave it in the oven and come back after he's cooked some more!

reviews.review_title: A game made for the classic GTA fans
reviews.review_description:
Viper Vice has a lot to offer:

- Venrova City: a big city to explore and drive around. 

- Three gangs to join. Each one with their own story, all three interconnected - and replayable if you want to unlock everything.

- Territory wars to complement the story. Conquer the city fighting neighbourhood by neighbourhood.

- Day and night cycles. Who doesn't love a good sunset by the beach or a chill night drive?

- Lots of weapons: including rocket launchers, molotov cocktails and katanas.

- Interiors: gun shops, pizzerias, bars, safehouses, clothing shops, warehouses, a hotel, a soon to be open casino, a bank you can actually rob, etc.

- Radio stations for the vibes.

- Police star chase system.

- Future upgrades: drivable motorbikes and helicopters, customisable clothes, secundary missions, businesses ownerships, etc. 

Mind you, the game is still on early access and has minor bugs to be fixed. But the developer is constantly addressing them and working on the game.

I really hope the game has a good reception so the developer can bring us more content.

If your feedback is going to be negative, please be kind and remember it's just one developer, not an AAA multimillionare company.
This game is actually really good and has so much to other but there are other things that u could add like better gore, bikes and motobikes and other jobs like hitman jobs

My rating will go up as the game improves but right now the game is really buggy and it seems like the whole game it's just a bunch of free assets mixed into a slop and also $20 is way too much for this I think $5 is good for it since it doesn't have good physics or good Gore there's a lot of stuff missing this doesn't feel like a game it feels like an experimental piece of slop and the fact that all the music is AI is crazy it seems like this game wasn't worked hard on at all just a bunch of free assets and AI music just shoved into a game I really do not want to sound rude since I'm a game developer too and I know how hard it feels when somebody's hating on your game got you got to fix these issues first by making the game cheaper than making your own characters and also make actual music this game has good potential and I'll do really like to see it improve

developer_response.body:
Hi!
I've updated the game 5 times since this review. If you have the time, please check out the latest version (0.4.31) and let me know what you think :)

I fixed a lot of issues and added new features like weapons spawning around interior locations and cars having random colors, etc.

reviews.review_title: Exactly what you been looking for !
reviews.review_description: Since Grand theft auto San andreas as been put on hold for years, how many of you did buy the quest especialy for that game and find out it wasn't coming out at all, on silence mode.. And many of you have been fixing it in some Pavlov disgusting servers or some other wanna be gta.. that time is over, this game give us both Vice city and San andreas in the same game, the map is huge, remind me of gta 2, the city vibe is Vice city with the beach and buildings, the mechanics is San andreas, you can rob banks, clothes shop, appartments, litteraly people on the street, there's a day and night cycle, so many weapons to buy, many property to own, lots of car to drive as there's missions to do too, 3 gangs you can join, turf wars, i could go on for a long time.. You like Gta ? buy it.

Genuinely this game has so much potential and its unique its like san Andreas couple of things you can improve on is the graphics, fix guns not being able to pull back, a better map since its like a box make it more unique in shape even like an expansion and add in multiplayer in the near future Ofcourse and new missions overall its amazing and unique to other games

Glitchy and flying npcs, absolutely ABYSMAL graphics, and no tutorial basically leaves you on the streets on what to do. The game is clearly unfinished, with un textured cars, and a bug that causes your car to flip over and everything in existence to glitch out. Huge disappointment from such a hyped up game.

developer_response.body:
Sorry for the bad experience. I’ll keep improving.
The game shows tutorials in text boxes during gameplay, but maybe they aren’t sufficient?
The flying npcs will be fixed in the next update

reviews.review_title: I see the vision… but this is unplayable
reviews.review_description: Calling this any sort of “release” is a straight up joke. Maybe I’m spoiled by the physics in games like hard bullet but this is honestly ridiculous. Guns are clunky to use and unpolished, driving is a nightmare, and the “story” feels like I’m playing a mobile game ripoff of gta. Oh and this is all not to mention that the entire map, characters, UI, EVERYTHING ABOUT THIS GAME FEELS LIKE A RUSHED INCOMPLETE PROJECT FULL OF FREE ASSETS. I’ll be refunding this game, maybe I’ll revisit if it gets some actual legs to stand on but as it is right now, it’s a mindless game that actually gave me a headache to play.

developer_response.body:
Sorry for the issues you had.
I have updated it a bunch of times (5 updates) since your review. You can see the update logs in the storepage :)

A lot has changed since release. If you have the time. Please try it out and let me know what you think.
Also let me know if you experience issues and I'll try to fix them asap.

reviews.review_description:
I really like this game. It’s a little janky because it just came out but it has a lot of cool mechanics and good gameplay. There is one thing that makes it very hard to play though. Every time I get my gun, it disappears out of my pocket within 2 minutes. This happens especially often in the car. Sometimes it’s fine though, and sometimes it’s genuinely unplayable. If that one little thing was fixed I would enjoy it a lot more than I already do. But from how I’ve seen the dev act and respond, I’m sure it will be fixed soon. I really like this game and I have lots of hope for it.

New review: A lot of the bugs have already been fixed only about a week after writing this. I moved my review to four stars. The game is already more polished and I really admire that so thank you sky yurt.

developer_response.body:
Hi!

Thanks for the review!
How are you doing? :)
Have you been able to check out the latest update?
I fixed a lot of bugs and add a lot of new content like side jobs and activities :)

Let me know what you think

The developer is aways dropping updates and hot fixes. It definitely has its bugs and is playable .Aiming is a little off and hard to aim with anything but a pistol. Driving is crazy touchy. Fix the helicopter from being able to shoot through all buildings and objects, literally nowhere to hide from it. Plz change the hit sound when being shot. Becomes over bearing where getting shot a bunch Add better bullet damage to npcs, cars and building. Like bullet holes. Remove some of the stars at night, way too many, unrealistic and hard to see helicopter. Fix cops from just randomly driving in circles when chasing you.add jewelry stores, gas stations to rob.. love the game

Game looks good but the instructions arnt clear your character changes calebration if you get out a car and you can’t fix it. The npc’s are horrible to shoot and there’s no gore or anything the physics are so bad and genuinely just such a disappointment I had high hopes for this game just for it to be boring

There is gore in the game though

Opening safes and robbing cashiers. Beating up pedestrians and police helicopters shooting at you from the sky. There's a lot to like and a lot more planned from the developer. So buy it and support it if you want a more complete GTA experience 😎
if you want gta in vr do not get this, this game is janky and just not good 2 stars

reviews.review_description: All I have to say is, this game has an insane amount of potential, definitely is the closest VR game we have to Gta and is just impressive for a solo developer! Can’t wait for the future updates, thanks John!

Its a good game i understand that it just released so there's going to be bugs but it's nothing that bad only thing that needs reModel is the npcs  cars and maybe the hands  and should probably take off the ability to get $1000 Infinite ammo it is a good game very good 
😌

Great Game but still very buggy… Definitely scratches the GTA in VR itch and feels a lot like Vice city in VR.. the ambition is there and seems like the Dev is working hard and as quick as possible to fix the existing problems… My review I’m sure will change in the near future 👍🏾 but shout out to the dev for even making something like this on a meta

I've updated the game 5 times since this review. If you have the time, please try it out and let me know what you think :)
Recently added a feature that spawns weapons  and medkits randomly around interior locations. Also the cars now have random colors instead of being hardcoded :D

If you have issues or ideas, let me know and I'll try to add them to the game :)

reviews.review_description: I just got this game today, and it is so fun, it may not have the best graphics, but I don’t care, it’s the closest thing we have to gta in vr (without mods) I mean it’s expensive… but also worth it, if you want gta vice city in vr, this is your best bet 10/10

I have followed your progress for a while and I really respect you trying such an ambitious game, I played for a couple of hours while listening to the Vice City soundtrack and you definitely got the vibe right.

Obviously there are a lot of bugs but nothing game breaking but for every bug I enjoyed a fun little detail like smashing car windows with the bat or spraying a pedestrian with the spray paint and watching them coughing.

There is still a lot of work to be done, my advice is work on the cars as right now they take off like an F1 car with the brakes of a model T, I would also make sure you can comfortably recenter yourself when in the car.

Best of luck

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review. I’ll keep updating and fixing issues and make adjustments to the cars

reviews.review_description: A GTA clone in VR that still has a lot of work to do, but is already really fun. I'm giving it 5 stars not because it's as good as “Half Life Alyx” or “Saints and Sinners,” but because it's really great for what it is. An ambitious project with high goals. The city looks okay and is already sufficiently diverse. The weapon mechanics and holstering work well. The phones are nice and old school, and the fictional stores and brands are cool. I would like to see billboards in the environment and on buildings. The world still looks a bit empty. What I don't like so much is the extremely terrible driving experience with the cars. Unfortunately, it's pure horror. I wish there was an alternative way to control them with the controller sticks. And I wish there was a small map on the wrist or one that you could make appear in your hand instead of having to open this huge panel. A navigation system in the car to guide you to your destination would also make everything easier. Otherwise, I can only say... keep it up, this could be something really big.

reviews.review_title: Best VR GTA game out there right now!
reviews.review_description: I've playtested different versions of people creating GTA in VR and honestly this one is one of my favorites mainly because it is polished with the gameplay and driving elements though there are bugs here and there the game is constantly getting fixes and updates. Love causing mayhem and the missions you are given is which you get to choose out of three gangs who you want to join and can watch gang on gang shootouts or be part of it yourself. 10/10 recommend.

reviews.review_title: The game is not that good
reviews.review_description: It doesn't look very good, that blood is not that realistic, it looks like GTA San Andres. The map is super small and I can't find out how to reverse the car or steer

developer_response.body:
Hi!
The hands that grab the Steering Wheel also controls the gas and brakes. While holding the Steering Wheel press trigger to drive and Y/B to brake/reverse

reviews.review_description:
I love stealing cars and running innocent pedestrians over, but it would be cool if you could make another game about san andreas  
That would be cool. i haven't run into any problems yet, though there are some things that need to be added ASAP, like the steering is a little stiff and finding things on the map and that's really it to be honest. 

Solid 9/10 
Would recommend 

-Jason4White

This might be the single best open world vr game on the quest right now, the freedom, driving, and gunfights feels amazing and the whole city just pulls you in. It’s ambitious, fun, and seriously impressive for a solo developer. 🙌
While the game isn’t as interactive as hoped, it is just early access, it’s impressive how little bugs I encountered for a launch title, it’s like Vice City x San Andreas, I definitely recommend.

Bearing in mind this is just released and in early access, I have to say I have a really been enjoying it. Having said that there is some way to go and a lot to be added and a lot to be polished, but what we have here is a solid foundation for what is looking like the GTA game we always wanted. Had this wish listed for ages and couldn’t wait for it to come out and it has not disappointed. GTA6 who cares about a flat un immersive out of date game when we have this. Hopefully just gets better and better. Well done. 
￼

Sucks, graphics suck, gameplay sucks and the worst thing, I can’t get a refund unless I play a minimum of two hours! As much as I want a refund, I can’t play another minute. In response to the dev, update, what updates? Slam into an object and you can’t back up. There’s no holster for the gun. Vehicle control is terrible. So much to list! And there’s no way I played 2 hours, I can barely get through 15 minutes. I really thought I was buying a GTA Quest game but this is no where near that game.

developer_response.body:
Regarding reversing in car: 
The hands that grab the Steering Wheel also controls the gas and brakes. While holding the Steering Wheel press trigger to drive and Y/B to brake/reverse. 
It works this way, so you can use your freehand to do drive-bys :)

Regarding holsters:
You have holsters at your sides for sidearms and shoulder holsters for larger weapons. You can adjust their offset if you find it difficult to use :)

reviews.review_description: The combat and kill mechanics feel underwhelming, and the fighting system needs significant improvement. On top of that, the game is currently too buggy to justify its $20 price tag. While I can see some potential, it doesn’t feel worth the cost in its current state.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
I've updated the game a bunch of times since this review. If you have the time, please try it out. I fixed a lot of issues and added new features like weapons spawning in interior locations, you can grab and use in combat.

Let me know if you experience issues. I would love to hear what you think so I can make this a better game

reviews.review_description: It's awesome 👌. But hopefully as updates come in, they'll give the NPC's personality. They don't talk much. I wish they had lots of stuff to say, and react to. Needs lots of dialog. Needs much richer content for the dynamics of the game.

Ive always loved games that are very fun but dont have the best graphics. And this game is perfect! also been wanting GTA VR for a long time and this game does it perfectly. Love it! and hope to see more updates in the future. Some bugs here and there but ehh who cares! Keep it up devs!
